name: Senior ML Engineer Role Brief.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
HR-002  Senior ML Engineer Role Brief
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Senior ML Engineer Role Brief
Hiring brief for Meridian’s AI Platform Engineering team.
Document ID
HR-002
Owner
AI Platform Engineering
Hiring Manager
Nora Patel
Open Date
2024-02-26
Classification
Internal Hiring
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Role Purpose
Meridian is hiring a Senior ML Engineer to lead production-grade LLM and retrieval systems used in knowledge search,
analyst assistance, and enterprise automation. The role partners with Platform, Security, Product, and Infrastructure teams.
Core Responsibilities
●
Design and operate production LLM and retrieval pipelines with measurable latency, relevance, and reliability goals.
●
Lead architecture decisions for fine-tuning, evaluation, observability, and model-serving patterns.
●
Mentor engineers and influence cross-functional technical roadmaps.
●
Partner with Security and Compliance on AI-specific controls, auditability, and regulated-workload requirements.
Role-Fit Criteria
Requirement
Type
Notes
LLM / transformer expertise
Must-have
Model architecture, fine-tuning, and evaluation depth
expected.
Production ML systems at scale
Must-have
Experience with large-scale inference and MLOps
operations.
Team leadership experience
Must-have
Technical leadership and mentoring track record required.
RAG / retrieval system design
Must-have
Vector retrieval, chunking, ranking, and relevance
trade-offs.
Regulatory compliance (SOC2, HIPAA)
Nice-to-have
Direct experience is valuable but trainable.
Edge / on-prem deployment
Nice-to-have
Useful for constrained environments and
customer-specific architectures.
Cross-functional collaboration
Nice-to-have
Ability to work across Product, Infra, Security, and
Analytics teams.
